footer.description: Watchborne helps EV charging installers monitor charging stations across multiple sites in real time.
footer.tagline: Real-time supervision for EV charging infrastructure.

warning.description: We're working closely with early adopters to build a simple and reliable monitoring platform for EV charging infrastructure.
warning.title: Currently in Alpha
warning.pricing: Features and pricing may evolve before the official release.

hero.title: Know the real status of your EV charge points.
hero.subtitle: Watchborne helps EV charging installers monitor charging stations across multiple sites in real time.

realtime.title: Real-time supervision
realtime.description: Monitor charger status instantly with live updates and clear operational visibility.

multisite.title: Multi-site monitoring
multisite.description: Organize charging stations across multiple customers and locations.

ocpp.title: OCPP-native
ocpp.description: Built around OCPP workflows and charging infrastructure operations.

offline.title: Offline detection
offline.description: Quickly identify disconnected stations before your customers do.

fleet.title: Fleet overview
fleet.description: Get a single view of every station deployed in the field.

reliable.title: Reliable monitoring
reliable.description: Designed for installers who need trustworthy operational visibility.

featuresSection.title: Built for EV charging installers
featuresSection.subtitle: Focus on operating your infrastructure, not chasing charger status.

mvpFeatures.title: Included today
mvpFeatures.subtitle: Everything required to supervise a fleet of charging stations.

cta.title: Stop guessing.
cta.subtitle: Know the status of every charger in real time.

hero.title: Let us talk.
hero.subtitle: Need help supervising your charging infrastructure?

loginPage.title: Welcome back.
loginPage.subtitle: Access your EV charge point monitoring dashboard.

magicLink.sentDescription: A sign-in link has been sent to the address below. Click it to access your dashboard.
magicLink.error: Couldn't send the sign-in link. Please try again.
magicLink.unknownUser: No account is associated with this email address. Request Alpha access to create one.

authError.otpExpired: This sign-in link has expired or was already used. Please request a new one below.

branding.tagline: Monitor your EV charge points in real time.

signupPage.title: Join the Alpha.
signupPage.subtitle: Sign up to access your EV charge point monitoring dashboard.

confirmation.sentDescription: A confirmation email has been sent to the address below. Click the link to activate your Alpha access.
confirmation.error: Couldn't create your account. Please try again.

branding.tagline: Monitor your EV charge points in real time.

alphaNotice.title: Pricing under validation
alphaNotice.description: Watchborne is currently in alpha. Pricing and packaging are being validated with early adopters and may evolve before the public release.
alphaNotice.launchAdvantage: Early adopters will benefit from preferential launch conditions.

hero.title: Simple pricing designed for charging infrastructure operators.
hero.subtitle: Plans are organized around the number of sites you manage.

futurePricing.title: Current pricing hypothesis
futurePricing.description: The model currently being evaluated is based on the number of managed sites.

cta.title: Interested in joining the alpha?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your infrastructure and supervision needs.

pricing.question: Is this pricing final?
pricing.answer: No. Pricing is currently indicative and may evolve before the official release.

billing.question: Will pricing be based on sites or charge points?
billing.answer: We are currently validating a site-based model with an included number of charge points.

alpha.question: Will alpha users receive special conditions?
alpha.answer: Yes. Early adopters will benefit from preferential launch conditions.
